title: Executive Order 6034—Authorizing the Appointment of Mr. Joseph A. Kinnahan
text:
Joseph A. Kinnahan, who, since September 4, 1923, has been serving in a position in the Post Office Department excepted from civil-service requirements, may be appointed in the classified service without compliance with civil-service rules.
This order is issued upon the recommendation of the Postmaster General.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
February 18, 1933.
